title: Mild Crispy Slovak Foie Gras Skewers
description: Savory, lightly seasoned foie gras cubes grilled on an iron teppan and finished crisp in an air fryer for a Mediterranean-friendly Slovak lunch.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 200°C and heat the iron teppan on medium‑high until hot.
Season the foie gras cubes with salt, pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and lemon zest, tossing until well‑coated.
Thread 4 to 5 cubes onto each skewer, leaving a small space between cubes.
Lightly brush the teppan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Sear the skewers on the teppan for 2 minutes per side until golden brown and caramelized.
Transfer the seared skewers to the air fryer basket and cook for 4 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the surface is crisp.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and let rest for 1 minute.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
